Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: These terms define how this site is used. The goal is clarity and fair use, not restriction.

usage.title: Use of content
usage.body: Content on this site is provided for informational purposes only. You may read and share it for personal use, but not misuse or misrepresent it.

limitations.title: Limitations
limitations.body: Content is provided as-is, without guarantees of accuracy or completeness. It is not intended as professional advice.

liability.title: Liability
liability.body: The site owner is not liable for any loss or damage resulting from the use of this site or reliance on its content.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: These terms may be updated over time. Continued use of the site implies acceptance of any changes.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any questions regarding these terms, you can contact the site owner through the available channels.
